name: Apple Cinnamon Popovers
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the margarine and let it cool.
2. Preheat the oven to 425°F.
3. Spray four popover pans (10 oz size) with cooking spray.
4. In a blender, combine all ingredients well.
5. Pour 1/4 of the batter into each cup.
6. Set the cups on a baking sheet and bake for 25 minutes, or until puffed and golden.
7. Using a knife, cut a slit in the top of each popover to let out steam.
8. Bake for an additional 5 minutes.
9. Serve with butter or jam. Each serving contains approximately 78 calories, 4 grams fat, and 25 grams carbohydrates. Fat content per serving is 20%.
